_comment: Flow parked_taxi_us — Regression: pilot requests taxi from PARKED at KVRB (Vero Beach). Verifies that after removing the engines_running gate (2026-04-24), REQUEST_TAXI is accepted while stationary. Previously this was rejected with 'start your engines first' when engines_running was false — a bogus check that only worked for jets (N1-based) and blocked all piston GA pilots.
name: Parked taxi — KVRB Ground (US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: Pilot calls Ground from PARKED (GS=0) for taxi. Must be accepted (no 'start engines first').
say.text: Vero Beach Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp with information Alpha ready to taxi
